name: ai_marketing_claude_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_claude capability.

prompts.name: website_audit_prompt
prompts.template: Perform a detailed audit of the website at {website_url} focusing on SEO, UX, and marketing effectiveness.
prompts.use_case: Marketing teams auditing client websites and generating comprehensive campaign materials

prompts.name: marketing_copy_prompt
prompts.template: Generate compelling marketing copy for {brand_information} targeting {target_audience} with the goal of {campaign_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Small businesses leveraging AI to create email marketing sequences and ad content without dedicated resources

prompts.name: email_sequence_prompt
prompts.template: Create an email sequence with {email_sequence_parameters.number_of_emails} emails, in a {email_sequence_parameters.tone} tone, including calls to action for {campaign_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Agencies conducting competitive intelligence to inform client marketing strategies

prompts.name: ad_campaign_prompt
prompts.template: Develop an ad campaign plan for {brand_information} focused on {target_audience} aiming to achieve {campaign_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Content planners developing organized, calendar-driven content strategies

prompts.name: competitive_intelligence_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze the marketing strategies of competitors: {competitive_brands} and summarize strengths and weaknesses.
prompts.use_case: Consultants preparing professional, consolidated reports for clients

prompts.name: content_calendar_prompt
prompts.template: Generate a content calendar for the following topics: {content_topics} aligned with the campaign goals: {campaign_goals}.
